title: 8 Herbal Teas for Women to Manage Symptoms of Hyperthyroidism
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra teas, also known as licorice root tea, may help alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The tea contains a compound called glycyrrhizin, which has been shown to inhibit the activity of an enzyme called 11-beta hydroxysteroid dehydrogenase, responsible for converting inactive thyroid hormones into active ones. This can lead to a decrease in thyroid hormone production, potentially reducing symptoms such as anxiety,...
